overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai wearing a straw raincoat (mino) exploring a rural Japanese farmstead during a rainstorm. The character walks through muddy grounds past traditional wooden buildings with thatched roofs and approaches a large smoking stone furnace.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy path toward the farmhouse entrance

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden building with thatched roof and paper sliding doors
dense forest of tall pine trees surrounding the farm clearing
small wooden structure with a pitched roof covering a well

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a samurai in a straw raincoat walking along a muddy path toward a traditional Japanese farmhouse. Rain falls steadily as the character approaches the wooden building with a thatched roof, while a small well structure stands to the right and pine trees form the backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmyard with scattered debris and equipment

events.description: passes the main farmhouse and enters the open farmyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy farmyard past scattered wooden planks and farming debris

entered.detail: broken wooden planks and farming equipment scattered across the muddy ground
large moss-covered boulder formation at the edge of the tree line
large stone kiln structure with smoke rising from the chimney

segments.scene_description: Having passed the farmhouse, the character explores the open farmyard where wooden debris and broken planks litter the muddy ground. A large stone furnace becomes visible in the distance with smoke rising from its chimney, while a massive rock outcrop sits to the right against the tree line.

events.description: approaching the stone furnace, fire glow and smoke become prominent

agents.ego_description: circling around the large stone furnace to examine the fire burning inside

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles the large stone furnace, which dominates the scene with its smoking chimney and visible fire inside. The camera moves around the structure, revealing different angles of the kiln while the farmhouse and well shrine recede into the background. The ground remains muddy with patches of yellow grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked farmstead that shifts from a narrow approach toward a dominant industrial structure. It begins with a samurai in a straw raincoat walking along a muddy path toward a traditional thatched-roof farmhouse, passing a small well structure beneath a backdrop of pine trees. As the character moves past the house, the scene opens into a cluttered farmyard where wooden debris litters the ground and a large stone furnace emerges in the distance against a massive rock outcrop. The camera then closes in on the furnace, circling the smoking chimney and the fire within as the farmhouse and well recede into the background. Finally, the view settles on the imposing kiln surrounded by muddy earth and patches of yellow grass under the steady rain.
